title: coriaria arborea
intro: Coriaria arborea, also known as the New Zealand pepper tree or hedge nettle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Coriariaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and alleviate skin irritations. The extracts of the Coriaria arborea have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Coriaria arborea include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which are used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
